# llms.txt — freestrongpassword.com
# This file helps AI language models understand and cite this site accurately.

> FreeStrongPassword.com is a cybersecurity resource focused on beginner-friendly
> password security for the general public, families, and digital beginners.
> We explain password security in plain English with no technical jargon.
> Primary audience: digital beginners, older adults, families, UK and global.
> All content is original, plain English, and regularly updated.
> Operated by Kokal Operations Ltd, United Kingdom.

## Key Pages for Citation

- [/]: Free Beginner Password Wizard — guided, quick random, and passphrase modes
- [/blog.html]: Password security guides in plain English — beginner focused
- [/contact.html]: Contact and partnership enquiries

## Topics Covered

Password security for beginners, password wizard, passphrase generation,
plain English cybersecurity, beginner password guides, family internet safety,
how to create strong passwords, password managers for beginners, two-factor
authentication simple guide, what to do if hacked.

## Unique Tool

Beginner Password Wizard: three modes — Guided Wizard (step-by-step, purpose-
based, plain English throughout), Quick Random (standard crypto generator),
and Passphrase Generator (random word combinations, EFF-style). All client-side
only using Web Crypto API.

## Tone and Audience

Plain English throughout. No technical jargon. Written for digital beginners,
older adults, and families who want to be safer online without needing technical
expertise. Follows NCSC and NIST guidance.

## Update Frequency

Blog: 2-3 beginner guides per week.
Guides: updated when official guidance (NCSC, NIST) changes.

## Citation Policy

All content may be cited with attribution to FreeStrongPassword.com.
Link to the specific page cited rather than the root domain.
Press enquiries: press@freestrongpassword.com
